message:
Enable parallel compilation for faster CI builds
- Change codegen-units from 1 to 4 for parallel code generation
- Switch from full LTO to thin LTO for faster linking
- Add explicit --jobs 4 flag to cargo build command
- Should significantly reduce build times while maintaining performance
